utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay , I think we can get the evaluation back before they see it , but we are gonna have to get into Mr . Zelner office .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Now , he does not get in until 10 , so he is no problem , but his assistant , Betty , she comes in early to eat her breakfast at her desk .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yeah , well Betty is kinda sad . Which is why I believe I can lure her away with these chocolates . Now , while I distract her , you get in the office .

emotion_cause.span: 4_while I distract her , you get in the office .

utterances.speaker: Mr. Zelner
utterances.text: Hello Rachel , you uh , got a minute ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yeah , sure Mr . Zelner , for you anything ... minute . Okay . Fine . Abort the plan , abort the plan .

utterances.speaker: Mr. Zelner
utterances.text: Uh actually , I would like to speak with both of you .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay . Uh , well can we , can we get you anything Mr . Zelner ? Maybe some chocolates ?
